mapper.select: SELECT * FROM master_board WHERE board_type = #{type} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY board_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT * FROM master_board WHERE board_type = #{type} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY view_cnt DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
mapper.update: UPDATE master_board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, edited_at = NOW() WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM master_board WHERE board_type = #{value} AND deleted = 0
SELECT board_type, count(*) as count FROM master_board WHERE username = #{member.username} AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY board_type
SELECT nickname FROM member WHERE username = (SELECT username FROM master_board WHERE board_id = #{value})

SELECT * FROM master_board WHERE board_type = #{type} AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{str}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{str}, '%')) AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY board_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT * FROM master_board WHERE board_type = #{type} AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{str}, '%') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY board_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM master_board WHERE board_type = #{type} AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{str}, '%') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY board_id DESC
SELECT * FROM master_board WHERE board_type = #{type} AND content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{str}, '%') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY board_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
